posting.jobTitle: Heating, Ventilation, and Air Conditioning Mechanic Apprentice
posting.sponsorName: Joint Apprenticeship and Training Committee for Plumbers and Steamfitters, Local Union #773
posting.locationSummary: Capital District and North Country regions of New York; applications available in Queensbury and Plattsburgh
posting.applicationSummary: Pick up applications in person in Queensbury or Plattsburgh during the recruitment period, 8:00 a.m. to 10:00 a.m. on the second Monday of each month. Completed applications must be received by noon the Friday following the second Monday. A $25 processing fee and $25 testing fee apply, with waivers available for financial need.
posting.applicationInPersonAddress: Plumbers and Steamfitters Local Union #773, 37 Luzerne Road, Queensbury, NY 12804; or L.H. LaPlante Co Inc., 52 Main Mill Street, Plattsburgh, NY 12901
posting.applicationHours: 8:00 a.m. to 10:00 a.m. on the second Monday of each month, excluding legal holidays, during the recruitment period. Applications must be received by noon the Friday following the second Monday of each month.
posting.applicationFeeDetails: A non-refundable $25 application processing fee is due at the time of application, and a $25 testing fee is due on testing day. Fee waivers may be requested and are approved upon showing verifiable proof of financial need.
posting.ageRequirement: Must be at least 18 years old.
posting.educationRequirement: Must have a high school diploma or a high school equivalency diploma such as TASC or GED. Proof is required after selection and at enrollment.
posting.transportationRequirement: Must have a valid driver's license to operate company vehicles and reliable transportation to various work sites and required classes at the approved school.
posting.classRequirement: Must attend required classes at the approved school and pay $100 each year toward textbook costs.
allRequirements: Must be at least 18 years old.
Must have a high school diploma or a high school equivalency diploma such as TASC or GED; proof will be required after selection and at the time of enrollment in apprenticeship.
Must sign the Pipe trades apprenticeship affidavit after selection and prior to enrollment, stating that the applicant is physically able to perform the work of the trade.
Physical ability may include lifting and carrying 75-100 pounds without assistance.
Physical ability may include moving and lifting piping materials up or down a flight of stairs for any period of time.
Physical ability may include moving and setting up heavy equipment.
Physical ability may include climbing and working off ladders at heights of 10 feet or more.
Physical ability may include working in crawl spaces under buildings or homes to perform work.
Physical ability may include working indoors and outdoors in severe weather conditions and extreme temperatures, including boiler-room conditions.
Physical ability may include working in dirty or damp places.
Must take the Work Keys Assessments aptitude test and score an average of at least 4.334 out of 7 to be interviewed.
Must have a valid driver's license to operate company vehicles.
Must have reliable transportation to and from various work sites and required classes at the approved school.
Must pay $100 each year toward the cost of textbooks for required classes at the approved school.
Must provide DD-214, Certificate of Release or Discharge from Active Duty, if applicable, after selection and at the time of enrollment in apprenticeship.
Must pay a non-refundable $25 application processing fee at the time of application and a $25 testing fee on testing day; fee waivers may be requested upon showing verifiable proof of financial need.
posting.requirementsSummary: Applicants must be at least 18, have a high school diploma or equivalency, pass the Work Keys aptitude test, and meet physical, transportation, and licensing requirements. A valid driver's license, reliable transportation, and payment of application/testing fees are required, with fee waivers available for financial need.
posting.contactSummary: For further information, contact Plumbers and Steamfitters, Local Union #773 at (518) 792-9157.
